scripts.dev: node ../../.tools/pnpm/bin/pnpm.cjs run build && HOMEBREW_FORGE_NODE_EXECUTABLE=$(command -v node) electron .
scripts.dev:vite: node ../../.tools/pnpm/bin/pnpm.cjs run build && HOMEBREW_FORGE_NODE_EXECUTABLE=$(command -v node) HOMEBREW_FORGE_DESKTOP_BACKEND=vite electron .
scripts.dev:runtime: node ../../.tools/pnpm/bin/pnpm.cjs run build && HOMEBREW_FORGE_NODE_EXECUTABLE=$(command -v node) HOMEBREW_FORGE_DESKTOP_BACKEND=runtime electron .
